entries.note: issue package module-local import/bootstrap boilerplate; keep modules portable and directly executable

portable-path helper family rotated after HITL scratchpad template extraction; helpers intentionally stay local because fallback behavior differs by surface and shared import coupling would exceed the value

planner `_relative_script_command` helper boilerplate repeated across portable skill-local planners; a shared helper would be premature for this slice
2-line fnmatch matches_any helper family rotated after prompt-bulk helper cleanup; keep portable skill scripts directly executable instead of adding shared import coupling for a trivial predicate

auto-seeded: portable per-skill copy
gather Google Workspace and Slack advice helpers intentionally share the adapter-mode payload dispatch contract while keeping provider-specific payload text separate and directly executable

standard adapter-resolution echo {found, valid, path, warnings} shared by the find-skills list_capabilities output and the narrative adapter-review output; the find-skills span re-fingerprinted after the next_step / recommendation_interpretation addition, surfacing this pre-existing intentional adapter-echo shape — a shared echo helper would couple unrelated skill adapter libs for negligible value

planner packet helper boilerplate mirrors handoff/debug planner payload shape intentionally for agent-facing consistency

standalone mutation CLI path resolver helpers; extracting this two-line helper adds import/bootstrap coupling for little value

note: Reviewed fixable-duplication overlay (item 5). Keyed by family identity (code: offset/path-independent content fingerprint; doc: family_signature). Stores only explicitly-classified families; an unlisted family defaults to 'unreviewed'. fixable_ceiling (count of 'fixable') is one-way and only decreases via a deliberate re-review. nose-baseline.json / doc-nose-baseline.json own drift detection; this overlay owns fixable classification.
